# Hustle House

> High-Efficiency Agentic Ecosystem of IIT Kharagpur Talent.

Hustle House is a premium network of technical specialists and creative directors from IIT Kharagpur. We provide high-impact services in SEO, Web Development, AI Automation, Content Production, and more.

## Core Values
- **Proof First**: Every specialist is backed by verified case studies (Live Proof).
- **Industrial Speed**: Fast execution driven by agentic workflows.
- **Premium Aesthetics**: High-end minimalist design (JetBrains Mono + Outfit).

## Core Services
- **SEO & Growth**: Technical audits, semantic content systems, and authority building.
- **Full-Stack Development**: Fast, high-conversion web apps and ecosystems.
- **AI Automation**: Agentic workflows for lead gen and business operations.
- **Creative Direction**: Premium video editing, design, and industrial-grade branding.
- **Digital Marketing & Content**: High-converting copy and strategic campaigns.

## Infrastructure
- **Supabase**: Backend and live data management.
- **Vanilla CSS**: Lightweight, performance-first design system.
- **Agentic Workflows**: Utilizing LLMs for rapid development and optimization.
